src/main/java/ru/nokkov/blps_lab/BlpsLab.general_idea: Extend the main application class with SpringBootServletInitializer to enable deployment as a WAR file to external servlet containers like JBoss.
src/main/java/ru/nokkov/blps_lab/BlpsLab.human_impl: extends SpringBootServletInitializer { @Override protected SpringApplicationBuilder configure(SpringApplicationBuilder application) { return application.sources(BlpsLabApplication.class); } }

pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
Switch project packaging from jar to war to support deployment to an external application server.
Exclude the embedded Tomcat starter to prevent conflicts when deploying to WildFly.
Exclude default Spring Boot logging dependencies to rely on the application server's logging.
Add the Spring Boot validation starter for bean validation support.
Add Lombok dependency to reduce boilerplate code in entities and services.
Add Spring Security starter to enable authentication and authorization features.
Add Spring Security test dependency for testing secured endpoints.
Add Jakarta Servlet API dependency with provided scope for WAR deployment compatibility.
Add WildFly Maven plugin to automate deployment to the WildFly application server.
Set the final WAR artifact name to blps-i.
Downgrade Spring Boot parent version from 3.3.0 to 3.2.4, likely for stability or compatibility reasons.

src/main/resources/application.propertie.general_idea: Configure the application to listen on a specific port.
Configure the primary datasource for the article database.
Configure the secondary datasource for the partner database.
Enable automatic SQL initialization on startup.
Enable SQL logging and formatting for debugging purposes.
Configure Hibernate to recreate the schema on startup.
Configure Hibernate naming strategies for camelCase to underscores conversion.
